what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record that links a design-source channel entry to an image asset located at image://design-source/company-info/p-16.
observations: The file consists entirely of YAML frontmatter with no prose body.
The target field points to an image URI under the design-source channel.
It records an exact UTC timestamp for when the attachment was added.
standouts: The target URI uses a custom image:// scheme scoped to the design-source channel.
The attachment ID and filename share the same short hash att-9cb67fdc.
concerns: The file contains no alt text, caption, or dimensions for the image.
There is no indication of who added the attachment or why.
notes: A lightweight provenance stub that records an image attachment to the design-source channel.
questions: What does image://design-source/company-info/p-16 resolve to in storage?
Is the attachment referenced by any message or note in the channel?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose as an image attachment record matches the content; it records metadata but does not store the image itself.
intention_signals: It appears intended to catalog an image asset attached to a design-source channel entry so the ledger can reference it by a stable ID and URI.
novelty: The use of a channel-scoped image:// URI as a target rather than a filesystem path.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped pointer from a channel attachment record to a specific image asset, enabling later retrieval and provenance tracing.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record of type images linking to image://design-source/company-info/p-16 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record the attachment of an image asset to the design-source channel for reference and provenance.
